hero.subtitle: One report. Smart matching. Secure return. Renuir connects people and places to recover what matters.

change.headline: That sinking feeling when you realize it's gone.
change.body: Your wallet at the airport. Your keys at the hotel. Your headphones on the train. The panic is instant. The process to get it back? Broken. Venues juggle spreadsheets, unanswered calls, and boxes of unclaimed items. You're left guessing.

howItWorks.headline: Three steps. That's it.
howItWorks.subtitle: Whether you lost something or found something, the process is the same.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe what you lost or found. Add a photo. Our AI handles categorization, color, and brand detection automatically.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Renuir compares descriptions, photos, locations, and timing. When there's a match, both sides get notified instantly.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Verify ownership, chat securely, and arrange a handover. Use our handover code to confirm the return. Done.

forIndividual.headline: Your stuff. Back where it belongs.
forIndividual.subtitle: The Renuir app is free. Report a lost item in under a minute, get matched automatically, and recover it without the runaround.
forIndividual.feature1: AI-powered matching across all nearby venues
forIndividual.feature2: Ownership verification that protects both sides
forIndividual.feature3: Secure in-app chat with the finder
forIndividual.feature4: Delivery option when meeting isn't possible

privateBeta.headline: For venues that want to do lost-and-found right.
privateBeta.subtitle: Airports, hotels, and transport hubs lose thousands of items each year. Most never get returned. Renuir gives your team a system that actually works.
privateBeta.feature1Desc: Staff log items in seconds. Our computer vision identifies the item automatically.
privateBeta.feature2Desc: Smart verification questions ensure only the real owner can claim an item.
privateBeta.feature3Desc: Guests scan a QR code to check if their item has been found. No calls needed.
privateBeta.feature4Desc: Full visibility on return rates, storage time, and staff activity.

developer.headline: Build on Renuir.
developer.subtitle: Full API access and white-label deployment for enterprises that need their own branded lost-and-found system.
developer.apiDesc: Item reporting, AI matching, claims, verification, and chat. All headless.
developer.whitelabelDesc: Your brand. Your domain. Full Renuir functionality under the hood.

hero.headline: We're here to help
hero.subtitle: Renuir exists to help people recover what they've lost, without panic, pressure, or uncertainty.

team.headline: The team behind Renuir
team.subtitle: Small team. Big mission. We're building the infrastructure layer for lost-and-found, starting from Berlin.

trust.headline: Built on trust
trust.subtitle: Every design decision starts with one question: does this protect the person who lost something?
trust.feature1Desc: Items are logged by businesses and institutions we've vetted.
trust.feature2Desc: Claims require evidence. No item is released without proof.
trust.feature3Desc: Your identity stays private until both sides confirm a match.
trust.feature4Desc: Every action is logged. Accountability is built into the system.

contact.headline: Let's talk.
contact.subtitle: Whether you're a venue looking for a demo or someone who needs help, we're here.

sectors.headline: Used across industries.
sectors.airportDesc: High-volume passenger flow. Cross-border returns. Compliance-ready.
sectors.hotelDesc: Discreet, service-oriented recovery that guests remember.
sectors.retailDesc: Central lost-and-found across multiple stores and floors.
sectors.universityDesc: Campus-wide system for thousands of students and staff.

hero.betaBanner: Renuir for Business is in private beta. Currently onboarding select partners.
hero.headline: The operating system for lost items.
hero.subtitle: Replace the lost-and-found box with an intelligent, auditable recovery platform. Join the venues already shaping the future of returns.
hero.socialProof: Join 50+ enterprise partners on the waitlist

costs.headline: Lost items are an invisible cost center.
costs.subtitle: For most venues, lost-and-found isn't a priority. It's an interruption. Staff deal with frantic visitors, manual phone calls, and storage rooms full of unclaimed items.
costs.bullet1: Unverified claims and no audit trail leave you liable.
costs.bullet2: Staff spend hours each week on manual logging and emails.
costs.bullet3: Unclaimed items pile up with no disposal process.

manage.headline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
manage.feature1Desc: Staff snap a photo. Our AI identifies category, brand, color, and condition in seconds. No typing required.
manage.feature2Desc: One-click shipping labels. Courier integration. Items get returned, not stored forever.
manage.feature3Desc: Full chain of custody logs. Automated disposal workflows after retention period. GDPR-ready.

testimonials.headline: Trusted by operational leaders.
testimonials.subtitle: See how forward-thinking organizations are turning lost property from a liability into a loyalty touchpoint.
testimonials.quote1: We reduced item processing time by 60% in the first month. It used to be chaos — spreadsheets, calls, guesswork. Now it runs itself.
testimonials.quote1Role: Director of Operations, Grand Central Hub
testimonials.quote2: The API integration was seamless. We connected Renuir to our property management system in under a week.
testimonials.quote3: Compliance was our biggest headache. Renuir's automated chain of custody logs solved that overnight.
testimonials.quote3Role: Head of Security, Metro Transit Authority

hero.betaBanner: The Renuir app is in private beta. The features below are currently in preview mode.
hero.headline: Lost something? We'll help you get it back.
hero.subtitle: Renuir connects your lost item with the venue that found it. Smart matching, secure chat, verified returns.

overview.headline: Four steps to your item back.
overview.subtitle: We turned the chaos of lost-and-found into a simple, guided process.
overview.step1Desc: Describe what you lost, or browse items reported by venues near you.
overview.step2Desc: Get notified when there's a match. Renuir compares photos, descriptions, location, and timing.
overview.step3Desc: Answer verification questions or upload proof. Only the real owner gets access.
overview.step4Desc: Meet up with a secure handover code, or choose delivery when available.

purpose.headline: Built for real-life moments.
purpose.card1Desc: Add a photo and a few details. Renuir handles the rest.
purpose.card2Desc: Lost and found items are continuously compared. You get notified the moment something fits.
purpose.card3Desc: Once your claim is approved, message the finder directly to arrange next steps.
purpose.card4Desc: Pick up in person or get it shipped. Your choice.

trust.headline: Your privacy is not optional.
trust.subtitle: Renuir replaces the chaos of lost-and-found with a system designed around your safety.
trust.feature1Desc: Items are logged by businesses and institutions we've vetted.
trust.feature2Desc: Claims require evidence. No item is released without proof.
trust.feature3Desc: Your details are shared only after both sides confirm a match.
trust.feature4Desc: Every action is logged for accountability and transparency.

hero.subtitle: Full API access and white-label deployment for enterprises that need total control over their lost-and-found operations.
hero.socialProof: Join 50+ enterprise partners on the waitlist

docs.apiDesc: Headless integration for item reporting, AI matching, claims verification, and secure chat.
docs.whitelabelDesc: Deploy a fully branded Renuir instance on your domain in minutes.

common.emailValidation: Please enter a valid email address

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.controllerBody: The controller responsible for data processing on this website and within the Renuir platform is Renuir UG (haftungsbeschränkt), Berlin, Germany. Email: privacy@renuir.com.
privacy.dataCollectedIntro: We collect and process the following categories of personal data:
privacy.dataAccount: Account data: name, email address, phone number, password (hashed)
privacy.dataPhotos: Item photos and descriptions uploaded when reporting lost or found items
privacy.dataLocation: Location data: venue or approximate location associated with a lost/found report
privacy.dataChat: Chat messages exchanged between users and venues within the platform
privacy.dataPayments: Payment data: processed by Stripe; we store only transaction references, not card details
privacy.dataTechnical: Technical data: IP address, browser type, device information, cookies
privacy.legalBasisBody: We process personal data on the following legal bases under Art. 6(1) GDPR:
privacy.basisConsent: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a)): for analytics cookies and optional communications
privacy.basisContract: Contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b)): to provide the Renuir service, process claims, and facilitate returns
privacy.basisLegitimate: Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f)): for fraud prevention, platform security, and service improvement
privacy.basisLegal: Legal obligation (Art. 6(1)(c)): for tax records, regulatory compliance, and law enforcement requests
privacy.thirdPartiesIntro: We share data with the following categories of processors, all bound by data processing agreements:
privacy.processorHosting: Hosting and infrastructure: Vercel (EU/US), for website and application hosting
privacy.processorPayments: Payment processing: Stripe, for secure payment handling via Stripe Connect
privacy.processorAI: AI services: for image recognition and item matching (data minimized, no personal identifiers sent)
privacy.processorAnalytics: Analytics: privacy-focused analytics tools to understand usage patterns
privacy.retentionBody: Account data is retained for the duration of your account and up to 30 days after deletion. Item reports and associated photos are retained for 12 months after resolution or 6 months after expiry if unresolved. Chat messages are retained for 6 months after claim resolution. Payment records are retained for 10 years as required by German tax law (§ 147 AO). Technical logs are deleted after 90 days.
privacy.transfersBody: Some of our processors operate outside the EU/EEA. Where data is transferred internationally, we ensure adequate protection through EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) or adequacy decisions. Stripe and Vercel maintain EU data processing commitments.
privacy.rightsIntro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.rightAccess: Right of access (Art. 15): obtain a copy of your data
privacy.rightRectification: Right to rectification (Art. 16): correct inaccurate data
privacy.rightErasure: Right to erasure (Art. 17): request deletion of your data
privacy.rightRestriction: Right to restriction (Art. 18): limit processing of your data
privacy.rightPortability: Right to data portability (Art. 20): receive your data in a machine-readable format
privacy.rightObjection: Right to object (Art. 21): object to processing based on legitimate interests
privacy.rightWithdraw: Right to withdraw consent: withdraw consent at any time without affecting prior processing
privacy.rightsContact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@renuir.com. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy.supervisoryBody: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. The authority responsible for us is: Berliner Beauftragte für Datenschutz und Informationsfreiheit, Friedrichstr. 219, 10969 Berlin, Germany.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or a notice on our website. The current version is always available at this URL.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.scopeBody: These Terms of Service govern the use of the Renuir platform, including the website, mobile applications, and API services, operated by Renuir UG (haftungsbeschränkt), Berlin, Germany. By creating an account or using our services, you agree to these terms.
terms.serviceBody: Renuir provides a digital platform for reporting, matching, and recovering lost items. The service connects individuals who have lost items with venues and organizations that have found them. Renuir facilitates the matching process through AI-powered technology, provides secure communication channels, and supports verified item returns.
terms.accountBody: You must be at least 16 years old to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must provide accurate and current information. Renuir reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.obligationsIntro: When using Renuir, you agree to:
terms.obligation1: Provide truthful information when reporting lost or found items
terms.obligation2: Not submit fraudulent claims or impersonate others
terms.obligation3: Respect the privacy of other users and venue staff
terms.obligation4: Not use the platform for any unlawful purpose
terms.verificationBody: Renuir uses a multi-step verification process to confirm item ownership before facilitating returns. This may include description matching, photo comparison, and knowledge-based verification questions. While we strive for accuracy, Renuir does not guarantee the identity of claimants and venues should apply their own judgment.
terms.paymentsBody: Business subscriptions and optional delivery fees are processed through Stripe Connect. All prices are shown inclusive of applicable VAT. Business accounts are billed according to the plan selected at signup. Renuir does not store payment card details. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis according to our refund policy.
terms.ipBody: The Renuir platform, including its design, code, AI models, and branding, is the intellectual property of Renuir UG. Users retain ownership of content they upload (photos, descriptions) but grant Renuir a non-exclusive license to use this content for the purpose of providing the service, including AI matching.
terms.liabilityBody: Renuir acts as a facilitator and does not guarantee the return of any lost item. Our liability is limited to intent and gross negligence in accordance with German law (§§ 521 ff. BGB). Renuir is not liable for the actions or omissions of users, venues, or third-party service providers. We are not liable for indirect or consequential damages.
terms.terminationBody: You may delete your account at any time through the app settings. Renuir may terminate or suspend your account for material breach of these terms, with reasonable notice where possible. Upon termination, your data will be handled according to our Privacy Policy.
terms.governingBody: These terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany. The exclusive jurisdiction for disputes is Berlin, Germany, unless mandatory consumer protection laws require otherwise.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms with reasonable notice. Continued use of the platform after changes take effect constitutes acceptance. Material changes will be communicated via email.

imprint.title: Imprint (Impressum)
imprint.companyRegistration: Registered: Amtsgericht Charlottenburg, Berlin, HRB 283063 B
imprint.odrBody: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr. We are not obligated and not willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
imprint.disclaimerContent: The contents of this website have been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages under general law (§ 7(1) TMG). However, under §§ 8-10 TMG, we are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information.
imprint.disclaimerLinksBody: Our website contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. We cannot accept liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator is always responsible for the content of linked pages.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.whatBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide a functional, secure, and personalized experience. This policy explains which cookies we use, why, and how you can control them.
cookies.necessaryBody: These cookies are essential for the website to function. They cannot be disabled.
cookies.necessarySession: Session cookie: maintains your login state during a browsing session
cookies.necessaryLocale: Locale cookie: remembers your language preference
cookies.necessaryConsent: Consent cookie: stores your cookie consent preferences
cookies.analyticsBody: With your consent, we use privacy-focused analytics to understand how visitors use our website. These cookies collect aggregated, anonymous usage data. No personal identifiers are tracked. You can opt out at any time via the cookie consent manager.
cookies.functionalBody: These cookies enable enhanced functionality such as remembering your preferences, form inputs, and display settings. They are set only with your consent.
cookies.thirdPartyBody: Some features of our website may set cookies from third-party services (e.g., Stripe for payment processing). These cookies are governed by the respective third party's cookie and privacy policies.
cookies.consentBody: When you first visit our website, a cookie consent banner allows you to accept or reject non-essential cookies. Your choice is stored and respected across sessions. You can change your preferences at any time by clicking the cookie settings link in the footer.
cookies.withdrawBody: You can withdraw or modify your cookie consent at any time by clicking the cookie settings link in the website footer, or by deleting cookies in your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website.
cookies.contactBody: For questions about our use of cookies, contact us at privacy@renuir.com.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.commitmentBody: Renuir UG is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying relevant accessibility standards, in compliance with the European Accessibility Act (EAA) and the German Barrierefreiheitsstärkungsgesetz (BFSG).
accessibility.standardBody: This website aims to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 at Level AA. These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible to people with a wide array of disabilities, including visual, auditory, physical, speech, cognitive, language, learning, and neurological disabilities.
accessibility.statusBody: We believe this website is partially conformant with WCAG 2.1 Level AA. Partially conformant means that some parts of the content do not fully conform to the accessibility standard. We are actively working to achieve full conformance.
accessibility.measuresIntro: Renuir takes the following measures to ensure accessibility:
accessibility.measure1: Semantic HTML structure with proper heading hierarchy and landmark regions
accessibility.measure2: Keyboard navigation support for all interactive elements
accessibility.measure3: Sufficient color contrast ratios meeting WCAG AA standards (minimum 4.5:1 for text)
accessibility.measure4: Alternative text for all meaningful images; decorative images are marked accordingly
accessibility.measure5: Focus indicators visible on all interactive elements for keyboard users
accessibility.limitationsBody: Despite our best efforts, some content may not yet be fully accessible. Older PDF documents may not be fully screen-reader compatible. Some complex interactive components are being reviewed for keyboard accessibility. We are actively addressing these issues.
accessibility.feedbackBody: We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of our website. If you encounter any barriers or have suggestions, please contact us at accessibility@renuir.com or call +49 (176) 3230-3721. We aim to respond to feedback within 5 business days.
accessibility.enforcementBody: If you are not satisfied with our response to your accessibility concern, you may contact the Schlichtungsstelle nach § 16 BGG at the Bundesministerium für Arbeit und Soziales (BMAS). The arbitration body is tasked with achieving an out-of-court settlement of disputes related to accessibility. More information is available at www.schlichtungsstelle-bgg.de.
